cd /workspace/YatCC && python3 -c "
with open('task/1/antlr/main.cpp', 'r') as f:
    content = f.read()
    lines = content.split('\n')
    for i, line in enumerate(lines):
        if 'std::regex re(' in line:
            print(f'Line {i+1}:')
            # The raw string R\"(...)\" ends at the first )karkat
            # But our pattern contains ) inside!
            # We need to use a different delimiter
            # R\"delimiter(pattern)delimiter\"
            print('  Need to use custom delimiter for raw string')"
